description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, featuring a flat roof and a light-colored brick exterior. The front of the building includes a main entrance flanked by several windows, and the structure is surrounded by a paved area with two large palm trees and marked parking spaces. The interior is divided into multiple rooms, including a living area, bedrooms, kitchen, and bathroom, all visible through the open roof design. The windows are small and regularly spaced, providing natural light to each room. The parking area is directly adjacent to the building, with a car parked near the entrance and a clear driveway. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, light brick exterior, and adjacent parking area with palm trees. The layout features multiple rooms and regularly spaced windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, several windows, and the interior room layout with palm trees and parking area in the background.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the parking area with a car, palm trees, and a partial view of the bungalow's rooms and windows.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the parking lot, palm trees, and the back facade of the bungalow with visible windows and entry points.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the parking area, car, and a clear look at the bungalow's side windows and room divisions.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with regularly spaced small windows
